name: A Standard Taxi Co
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found; appears to be a micro single-operator taxi service in Raleigh, NC. Not a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee taxi company with no evidence of school-bus, SPED, or student transportation contracts. Too small and wrong service type for Summit tuck-in.

name: Impps Taxi Svc
recent_news: Listed on Yelp and CMac taxicab directory as a Raleigh, NC taxi service at 8708 Lake Wheeler Rd. No school bus/student transport activity identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro taxi operator, not a school-bus contractor; outside Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: Mobile Fiesta Transportation
recent_news: Likely related to 'Taxi Fiesta Transportation, LLC' BBB listing in Raleigh categorized as airport transportation. No school-bus or SPED contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro taxi/airport shuttle operator, not a student transportation contractor.

name: Signature Corp Twne Car Lmusin
recent_news: Tiny corporate town-car/limousine operator in Porter, TX (Houston metro). No school-bus or special-needs school transport activity identified; multiple unrelated 'Signature Limousine' brands operate regionally.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limo/town-car service, not a school-bus operator. Outside Summit's acquisition profile.

name: Capital City Limousine
recent_news: Operates as Capital West Limousine in Olympia, WA since 1991; managed by Baurice Nelson. Services include weddings, corporate, airport express. No school-bus or student transport contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Luxury limo/party-bus operator since 1991, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Outside Summit's tuck-in scope.
